calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver Of Liquor License
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver Of Liquor License is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC. Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is denied without prejudice to being refiled. Plaintiff Birite Restaurant Supply did not file a proof of service of the application papers. The moving party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
